title: Opening for Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Apollo Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Apollo Tyres:
Apollo Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres!
